hostel_campus.college_name: Bangalore City College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Please don't join City College, taking advice from others, you will suffer afterwards!
reviews.review_text: In City College, Jayanagar 7th block, the infrastructure is very poor. It's not only a degree college but also mixed with a school and PU college in one building. For PU, one floor; for school, one floor; and for degree students, one floor, very congested.

reviews.review_heading: The college is a total wastage of money.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are good. Rest is all waste in this college. There is no canteen, no medical facility, no sports and games, etc. The infra is good but do not fall for it. It is just a makeup for the college. Nothing is good in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The hostel infrastructure is very good, and they serve North Indian and South Indian food. The warden is very caring about the students.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure. Wi-Fi is enabled in the college. We have a library and lab. The food served in the hostel is good. They serve both South and North Indian food, and the hostel warden is caring towards the students. We have medical facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: The teaching is good, but infrastructure and co-curricular activities are poor.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very bad here. The infrastructure is not satisfying to students and faculty members. Classrooms are good, but labs and Wi-Fi facility are poor. Instruments are not in condition, and students suffer during exams. There is no proper food and canteen. Our college doesn't give priority to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good course and very helpful for students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, lab and classroom are available for our course. The quality of the food served is not good. However, apart from that, other things are better. The quality of the mess is better, and the hostel rooms are well ventilated and well distributed. They have attached bathrooms, and sports facilities are available. There are also medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very effective course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Classrooms are very good. The library room is not so huge, but it has some knowledgeable books. It has 3 hostel buildings. Food served in the hostel is not so good. Water supply is not available all the time. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Experienced teacher with good infrastructure and surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facility like Wi-Fi is there in the college as well as a proper laboratory. Also, the classroom is very good for study and also suitable for a student's mind. Let's talk about the hostel, the condition is very good and there are 3 major hostels in the college, one is for girls and two hostels for the boys.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, an average college with good faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Library and laboratories are very good. Only volleyball and basketball courts are available in the college play ground which is a bit harsh for cricket and football lovers. Canteen is much improved in the last year. Hostel is not in campus. There are certain problems in the hostel regarding the quality of food and sometimes the availability of water. Only you can south indian food in the hostel menu which isn't suitable for north indian students. Classrooms are organised. You can use free Wi-Fi ...

reviews.review_heading: Good, but not good as well.
reviews.review_text: The classroom was good. The library is good. There are no medical facilities, no sports, no games, Wi-Fi works very slow. I don't know much about the hostel, but my friend used to stay in the hostel. She used to tell that hostel food is not good. The same food will be provided for three times also.

reviews.review_heading: The colleges had really good infrastructure, good placements, and support.
reviews.review_text: I studied at these colleges. They gave me placement and internship opportunities. 98% of students got placed in their jobs, and I think everyone is doing well. In college, we learned many life lessons. Most students got internships from these colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and decent placements, but it need better industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: College offered Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, a good library, and decent labs for B.B.M. Hostel facilities were decent and shared rooms. Food in the mess was average but hygienic. Canteen was better. Medical help was available. Sports and indoor games were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus life, supportive teachers, decent placements, but scope for improvement in facilities.
reviews.review_text: Bangalore City College had Wi-Fi, labs, library, good classrooms, hostel with basic amenities. Sports facilities were decent. Food and water quality in mess could vary. Medical aid was available. The campus was clean and well-connected with friendly staff and regular cultural activities.

reviews.review_heading: Yes, good placement and really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: It is a very big college. Every classroom library hostel is good. Mess, canteen, sports and medical facilities are good. We have got the best labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi etc. We have sports days. Infrastructure is beautiful.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good. All classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. All labs are good. The library has a huge collection of books with Wi-Fi. Our college has 4 girls' hostels and a common room. Washrooms are not good. The hostel is quite cost-effective.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were good as they contained smart boards. Various subjects were taught through those boards. It helped students to understand the topics in a better way.

reviews.review_text: Our college provided a hostel facility. The hostel has electricity, a washing machine, labs, books, a mess, medical facilities, games, and sports. The hostel rooms were clean.
